ul.li: ISN Selection: Cryptographically secure PRNG required to prevent sequence prediction attacks.
Option Negotiation: MSS (Maximum Segment Size) and Window Scaling (WS) are only exchanged during the SYN segments.
TCB State: Transition to ESTABLISHED occurs on the initiator side upon receipt of SYN-ACK, and on the responder side upon receipt of the final ACK.
Retransmission: If SYN-ACK is not received, initiator enters exponential backoff (typically 1s, 3s, 7s).
